title: stelis velivolva
intro: Stelis velivolva, also known as the "hairy helmet orchid," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis velivolva are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Stelis velivolva include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues.
